---
title: "The tracks facing the exam"
subtitle: "One diploma, but very different paths. Depending on the chosen track, the syllabus and the odds of success are not the same."
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
source("R/common.R")
source("R/i18n.R")
source("R/figures.R")
lang <- "en"
g <- filieres_data()
```

::: {.callout-note}
This page is being translated; the narrative text is not final.
:::

## The weight of each track

*Text to be translated.*

```{r effectifs-serie}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 3.8
#| fig-alt: "Candidate counts by track."
fig_fil_effectifs(g, lang)
```

## Pass rate by track

*Text to be translated.*

```{r taux-serie}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4.2
#| fig-alt: "Pass rate by track with confidence intervals."
fig_fil_taux(g, lang)
```

## The distribution of grades, track by track

*Text to be translated.*

```{r ridgeline}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 5.2
#| fig-alt: "Distributions of averages by track (ridgeline)."
fig_fil_ridgeline(g, lang)
```

## Are track and success linked?

*Text to be translated.*

## Truly different grade levels?

*Text to be translated.*
